critical.mandate: Preserve existing content not being changed
Add version note documenting what changed and why

step.title: Load PRD
step.action: Display current structure summary to user

step.title: Identify Changes
step.action: Confirm scope of changes before proceeding

step.title: Apply Edits
step.action: Make requested changes while preserving unchanged content
Add version note at top: date, changes made, reason

step.title: Save Updated PRD
step.template-output: Save updated PRD with version note prepended
